title: Recipe For An Editor:
content:
Take a personal hatred of authors,
        Mix this with a fiendish delight
     In refusing all efforts of genius
        And maiming all poets on sight.

        - Life.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Recipe For An Editor:", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
